headline: Agilent Cancer Research Push Spurs Collaboration Focus And Investor Reassessment
summary: Agilent Technologies (NYSE:A) highlighted new technologies and scientific data aimed at advancing cancer research. The company presented these developments at the American Association for Cancer Research Annual Meeting. Agilent also announced a scientific collaboration with Oxford Nanopore Technologies focused on oncology research tools. For investors, Agilent Technologies sits at the intersection of instruments, diagnostics, and life sciences tools, an area that underpins much of modern...
